content:
## 🇮🇳 Indian Stocks

### MARUTI (NSE): +4.5% on Jefferies upgrade to Buy, FY27-29 EPS raised

Maruti Suzuki shares rose 4–5% on July 1–2 after Jefferies upgraded the stock to "Buy" from "Hold" on June 30, with target price raised to ₹16,500 (implying 20%+ upside from the prior close). The brokerage nudged FY27–FY29 EPS forecasts up 2–4%, citing improving demand, lower input costs after crude oil fell on easing geopolitical tension, and attractive valuation after the year's underperformance. Q1 FY27 domestic passenger vehicle sales jumped 33.45% year-on-year to 525,228 units, with June dispatches rising 23.78% on strong SUV demand, confirming the earnings upgrade thesis.

**Why it matters.** Maruti's re-rating signals confidence that India's auto sector is accelerating out of a demand plateau into sustainable double-digit growth. Lower oil prices and renewed consumer spending after the Iran-Qatar talks reduced geopolitical risk, dialling up sentiment for large-cap cyclicals. Peers like Bajaj Finance and Bajaj Auto benefit from the same macro relief. For domestic equity investors, this is the first post-monsoon reset—consumption data through August will determine if the momentum is real. An AI engineer in Bangalore watching the market would read this as the correction in 2026's first half bottoming, with visibility into capex and EPS cycles improving enough to justify analyst support.

**Action.** Watch the NSE bulletin for July 9 SIAM passenger vehicle sales data for June (forward indicator of July demand). Jefferies's ₹16,500 target implies 14.6% upside from ₹14,395 (July 1 close); the first resistance sits at prior peaks near ₹14,800. Check the investor relations section of marutisuzuki.com for Q1 FY27 results announcement (typically mid-July for June quarter close).

*Sources: [[Maruti Suzuki India - Official]( https://www.marutisuzuki.com/)]([Maruti Suzuki India - Official]( https://www.marutisuzuki.com/)) · [[Jefferies Upgrade - HDFCSky](https://hdfcsky.com/news/maruti-suzuki-share-price-jumps-4percent-after-jefferies-upgrade)]([Jefferies Upgrade - HDFCSky](https://hdfcsky.com/news/maruti-suzuki-share-price-jumps-4percent-after-jefferies-upgrade)) · [[NSE: MARUTI](https://www.nseindia.com/get-quote/equity/MARUTI/Maruti-Suzuki-India-Limited)]([NSE: MARUTI](https://www.nseindia.com/get-quote/equity/MARUTI/Maruti-Suzuki-India-Limited))*

---

### TITAN (NSE): +3.4% on Q4 earnings beat, ₹15 dividend record date set for July 9

Titan Company rose 3.4% on July 2 as the market digested May-announced Q4 FY26 results showing profit after tax of ₹1,179 crore, up 35.36% year-on-year, against revenue of ₹20,300+ crore, up 46% year-on-year. The jewellery segment delivered 50% YoY growth, with new collections and exchange programs powering robust margins. The board set July 9, 2026 as the record date for a ₹15 per share dividend (subject to shareholder approval at the July 27 AGM), payable on or after July 28. The stock closed around ₹4,422 on June 30 and traded ₹4,390–₹4,504 on July 1.

**Why it matters.** Titan's 35% profit beat and 46% revenue growth outpace India's discretionary consumption surge heading into the second half of the fiscal year. The jewellery business—67% of revenue and 50% growth—reflects wedding season demand and rural wealth expansion as crop cycles improve. The ₹15 dividend (implied yield ~3.4% at ₹4,400) signals management confidence in cash generation and capital discipline. For mid-cap domestic equity allocators, Titan is a bellwether for non-essential spending power in India; this result validates the bull case for consumption stocks ahead of Q2 earnings season in August–September. The Damas acquisition (67% stake, ₹2,858 crore) signals international expansion ambitions that could unlock multi-year upside.

**Action.** Verify shareholder approval at the July 27 AGM before the July 28 dividend payment date; check the Titan investor relations portal for the dividend authorisation details. The Q4 beat's earnings power suggests FY27 guidance updates due in early July; monitor titancompany.in for full-year FY27 revenue and PAT guidance. Intermediate resistance at ₹4,600; support at the 200-day moving average near ₹4,350.

*Sources: [[Titan Q4 FY26 Results - HDFCSky](https://www.sahi.com/blogs/titan-q4-fy26-results)]([Titan Q4 FY26 Results - HDFCSky](https://www.sahi.com/blogs/titan-q4-fy26-results)) · [[Titan Dividend Record Date - ScanX](https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/titan-company-fixes-record-date-for-15-dividend/44272834)]([Titan Dividend Record Date - ScanX](https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/titan-company-fixes-record-date-for-15-dividend/44272834)) · [[NSE: TITAN](https://www.nseindia.com/get-quote/equity/TITAN/Titan-Company-Limited)]([NSE: TITAN](https://www.nseindia.com/get-quote/equity/TITAN/Titan-Company-Limited))*

## 🏗 Tech & Startups

### Bending Spoons Soars 40% on Nasdaq Debut, Valued at $18.4B in Italian Software Giant's IPO

Milan-based Bending Spoons, which has quietly assembled a portfolio of beloved internet brands including Vimeo, Meetup, Eventbrite, and WeTransfer, went public on July 1 at $29 per share—above its $26-$28 guidance range. The IPO valued the 13-year-old company at $18.4 billion, raising $1.68 billion across 57.9 million shares, with the stock jumping 40% by close of trading. The company's private valuation of $11 billion just months prior makes this a 67% jump to public pricing.

**Why it matters.** Bending Spoons proves the acquisition-and-operations playbook works at scale. Rather than flip properties for quick exits, the company applies ruthless operational discipline to fix struggling but durable products—extracting value from companies the market had written off. This is a lesson for founders: the most defensible moats aren't always greenfield innovation; sometimes they're unglamorous execution and unit economics. The pre-IPO valuation jump from $11B to $18.4B in months signals investor appetite for platform operators that can make acquired assets profitable at scale.

**Action.** Watch Bending Spoons' first earnings call and 10-K for ARR trends across acquired properties and customer retention metrics. Founders running platform plays should reverse-engineer their operating model through regulatory filings—particularly how they justify the valuation on mature, lower-growth assets. Track stock performance post-IPO for signals on whether the market sustains this multiple or if acquisition-focused rollups face pressure as a category.

*Sources: [[TechCrunch: After $18B IPO, Bending Spoons founder says success comes from minimizing luck](https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/01/after-18b-ipo-bending-spoons-founder-says-success-comes-from-minimizing-luck/)]([TechCrunch: After $18B IPO, Bending Spoons founder says success comes from minimizing luck](https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/01/after-18b-ipo-bending-spoons-founder-says-success-comes-from-minimizing-luck/)) · [[Quartz: Vimeo owner Bending Spoons priced IPO above range at $18 billion valuation](https://qz.com/bending-spoons-ipo-priced-above-range-18-billion-070126/)]([Quartz: Vimeo owner Bending Spoons priced IPO above range at $18 billion valuation](https://qz.com/bending-spoons-ipo-priced-above-range-18-billion-070126/))*

### Together AI Closes $800M Series C at $8.3B Valuation as GPU Scarcity Drives Demand for Open-Model Infrastructure

Together AI, a neocloud provider renting GPU clusters for open-source AI model inference, raised $800 million in Series C funding at an $8.3 billion valuation on July 1, led by Saudi Arabia's Aramco Ventures with participation from Vista Equity Partners, General Catalyst, Emergence Capital, and Nvidia itself. This represents a 2.5x jump from the company's $3.3 billion valuation and $305 million Series B just 16 months prior—a compound signal that the infrastructure race to scale open models is accelerating faster than most forecasts predicted.

**Why it matters.** Together AI's traction exposes a real gap in the compute market. The company reported annual bookings exceeding $1.15 billion last quarter, serving thousands of paying customers (Cursor, Cognition, Decagon among them), with committed capacity growth pledges from investors covering 500+ megawatts of compute. This is a supply story dressed as a funding story: open-source model adoption has tripled in the past year, and proprietary model pricing hasn't dropped fast enough to stem defection. Founders building on open weights have a new lever: cost-efficient inference infrastructure that competes on price and latency with proprietary clouds. The sector is moving from "can we train models" to "can we run them cheaper than Anthropic and OpenAI."

**Action.** Track Together AI's customer churn and land expansion in the quarterly results it will eventually disclose. Check whether their cost-per-inference advantage holds as competitors (CoreWeave, Lambda Labs) raise capital and scale. If you're building a model company, reach out to Together's sales team and benchmark their pricing against your current inference spend—this round signals aggressive pricing competition ahead, which directly impacts your unit economics.

*Sources: [[TechCrunch: Neocloud Together AI raises $800M, leaps to $8.3B valuation](https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/01/neocloud-together-ai-raises-800m-leaps-to-8-3b-valuation/)]([TechCrunch: Neocloud Together AI raises $800M, leaps to $8.3B valuation](https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/01/neocloud-together-ai-raises-800m-leaps-to-8-3b-valuation/)) · [[SiliconANGLE: Together AI raises $800M to grow its AI-optimized public cloud](https://siliconangle.com/2026/07/01/together-ai-raises-800m-grow-ai-optimized-public-cloud/)]([SiliconANGLE: Together AI raises $800M to grow its AI-optimized public cloud](https://siliconangle.com/2026/07/01/together-ai-raises-800m-grow-ai-optimized-public-cloud/))*

## 🩹 Health & Science

### AstraZeneca's Oral GLP-1 Advances to Phase III with 10.5% Weight Loss Over 26 Weeks

AstraZeneca presented Phase IIb data for elecoglipron, an oral small-molecule GLP-1 receptor agonist, at the American Diabetes Association 2026 Scientific Sessions in June. In the VISTA trial, 229 adults with obesity or overweight achieved average weight loss of 10.5% at 26 weeks versus 0.6% for placebo, with sustained 11.8% loss at 36 weeks. Results were simultaneously published in The Lancet, positioning elecoglipron for Phase III trials in obesity and type 2 diabetes.

**Why it matters.** Elecoglipron represents a material shift in GLP-1 accessibility. Current therapies (semaglutide, tirzepatide) are weekly or twice-weekly injectables; an oral formulation eliminates needle barriers, reduces monitoring costs, and broadens prescriber adoption. For biotech investors, this validates the small-molecule GLP-1 pathway after years of injectable dominance. For builders in digital therapeutics and cardiometabolic AI, oral GLP-1s create new engagement surfaces for adherence monitoring, nutrient coaching, and lean-mass preservation during weight loss.

**Action.** Obtain the full Phase IIb data from The Lancet publication to assess safety signals and gastrointestinal tolerability (often a limiting factor in oral GLP-1s). Monitor the EMBOLD Phase III trial enrollment for enrollment timelines—approval could arrive by 2028. Builders should assess whether current digital health partnerships require reformulation for oral-dosing compliance patterns versus injectable reminders.

*Sources: [[The Lancet — Elecoglipron Phase IIb VISTA Trial](https://www.thelancet.com/journals/lancet/article/PIIS0140-6736(26)00748-8/fulltext)]([The Lancet — Elecoglipron Phase IIb VISTA Trial](https://www.thelancet.com/journals/lancet/article/PIIS0140-6736(26)00748-8/fulltext)) · [[AstraZeneca Press Release](https://www.astrazeneca.com/media-centre/press-releases/2026/elecoglipron-an-oral-small-molecule-glp-1-ra-moves-to-phase-iii-programme.html)]([AstraZeneca Press Release](https://www.astrazeneca.com/media-centre/press-releases/2026/elecoglipron-an-oral-small-molecule-glp-1-ra-moves-to-phase-iii-programme.html)) · [[Clinical Trials Arena Coverage](https://www.clinicaltrialsarena.com/news/ada26-astrazeneca-unveils-positive-data-for-phase-iii-ready-oral-glp-1ra/)]([Clinical Trials Arena Coverage](https://www.clinicaltrialsarena.com/news/ada26-astrazeneca-unveils-positive-data-for-phase-iii-ready-oral-glp-1ra/))*

### Roche's Blood-Brain-Barrier Piercing Alzheimer's Antibody Clears Amyloid in 92% of Trial Patients

Roche presented interim Phase Ib/IIa data for trontinemab at CTAD25, showing 92% of early symptomatic Alzheimer's patients became amyloid PET negative (no measurable plaques) following treatment with the Brainshuttle-engineered antibody. Amyloid clearance was rapid: 9 out of 10 participants achieved plaque elimination within 28 weeks at the 3.6 mg/kg dose. The Brainshuttle technology attaches a protein shuttle to the antibody to facilitate crossing the blood-brain barrier, a persistent bottleneck in neurobiology drug delivery.

**Why it matters.** Trontinemab's 92% amyloid clearance rate far exceeds prior anti-amyloid monoclonal antibodies (lecanemab, aducanumab). The proprietary delivery mechanism—enabling larger, antibody-based therapeutics to reach brain tissue—unlocks a new class of disease-modifying approaches for Alzheimer's and potentially other neurodegenerative diseases. For investors in neurotech, this validates Roche's Brainshuttle platform. For AI-in-health developers, this signals demand for cognitive decline monitoring and amyloid-clearance biomarker tracking in preclinical populations.

**Action.** Read the full Phase Ib/IIa efficacy and safety publication when released (expected 2026 Q3–Q4) to assess amyloid-related imaging abnormalities (ARIA) incidence—the dominant safety signal in anti-amyloid trials. Monitor the Phase III TRONTIER 1 and 2 trial design and recruitment; Roche is also exploring a preclinical Alzheimer's arm, signaling broader risk populations. Builders should track biomarker assay partnerships and plasma phospho-tau testing standardization, as patient stratification will determine market access.

*Sources: [[Roche Media Release — Brainshuttle AD Data](https://www.roche.com/media/releases/med-cor-2025-07-28)]([Roche Media Release — Brainshuttle AD Data](https://www.roche.com/media/releases/med-cor-2025-07-28)) · [[Psychiatric Times Coverage](https://www.psychiatrictimes.com/view/positive-interim-results-on-trontinemab-validate-brainshuttle-technology-for-alzheimer-disease-treatment)]([Psychiatric Times Coverage](https://www.psychiatrictimes.com/view/positive-interim-results-on-trontinemab-validate-brainshuttle-technology-for-alzheimer-disease-treatment)) · [[Clinical Trials NCT07170150](https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/NCT07170150)]([Clinical Trials NCT07170150](https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/NCT07170150))*

## 🎤 Culture & World

### Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's Madison Square Garden wedding becomes the American royal wedding of 2026

Pop star Taylor Swift and Kansas City Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce are holding a two-part wedding celebration at Madison Square Garden on July 2-3, 2026. An intimate rehearsal dinner for roughly 100 guests takes place Thursday at the Infosys Theater starting at 5:30 p.m. ET, followed by a black-tie reception Friday for 500 to 999 attendees across the main arena. The couple has instituted a strict no-phone policy for all guests, vendors and security, and requested no gifts. Kelce proposed in August 2025 after dating Swift since 2023.

**Why it matters.** This wedding represents the collision of America's two largest cultural industries—global pop music and professional football—into a single spectacle timed around July 4th. Outlets including Reuters and NBC have framed it as "America's royal wedding." The event has generated millions in wagers across prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket, making it the first wedding where you can bet on bridesmaids. The media saturation signals a shift in what counts as major culture: celebrity unions now command the same attention infrastructure traditionally reserved for state events or historical milestones. For Shashank's distribution read: this is the apotheosis of celebrity-as-product, with Swift's global fanbase and Kelce's sports audience creating a cultural moment that transcends both industries.

**Action.** The no-phone policy will be tested immediately—watch for leaks from security, staff, or guests about performances, fashion choices, and the guest list itself. The discourse will split between spectacle celebration and critique of celebrity excess. Track whether this becomes a template for how major figures in different fields signal cultural dominance through union rather than individual achievement.

*Sources: [[CNN](https://www.cnn.com/2026/07/01/entertainment/taylor-swift-travis-kelce-wedding-weekend)]([CNN](https://www.cnn.com/2026/07/01/entertainment/taylor-swift-travis-kelce-wedding-weekend)) · [[Rolling Stone](https://www.rollingstone.com/music/music-features/taylor-swift-travis-kelce-wedding-everything-we-know-1235584260/)]([Rolling Stone](https://www.rollingstone.com/music/music-features/taylor-swift-travis-kelce-wedding-everything-we-know-1235584260/)) · [[Netflix Junkie](https://www.netflixjunkie.com/music-news-how-taylor-swift-wedding-became-the-american-royal-wedding-of-two-thousand-twenty-six/)]([Netflix Junkie](https://www.netflixjunkie.com/music-news-how-taylor-swift-wedding-became-the-american-royal-wedding-of-two-thousand-twenty-six/))*

---

### World Cup knockout round begins with three continental clashes

The 2026 FIFA World Cup enters its Round of 32 elimination stage on July 2 with three high-stakes matches: Spain versus Austria at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles (3 p.m. ET), Portugal versus Croatia at BMO Field in Toronto (7 p.m. ET), and Switzerland versus Algeria at BC Place in Vancouver (11 p.m. ET). Each match eliminates one nation and advances the winner toward the July 19 final. The tournament field includes 48 teams, the largest number in World Cup history, spread across Canada, Mexico, and the United States.

**Why it matters.** The knockout stage transforms World Cup competition from group-stage attrition into sudden-death drama, where tactical adjustments and individual moments determine survival. This particular slate represents genuine geographic and competitive spread: Spain as defending champion or Austria as underdog, Portugal and Croatia both familiar Final Four performers, and the Switzerland-Algeria pairing as a lower-seed upset opportunity that embodies the tournament's expanded field. The 48-team format and North American hosting have broadened participation globally—broadcast times split across three time zones on July 2 alone will distribute viewing across multiple continents, fragmenting attention and creating multiple "main events" rather than a single dominant match.

**Action.** Watch for tactical shifts in how traditional powers (Spain, Portugal) pace themselves against fresher opponents now in the tournament. Algeria presents the upset narrative. The real signal is whether the expanded format dilutes or heightens dramatic tension—does spreading matches across three continents build sustained engagement or splinter the cultural moment?

*Sources: [[FIFA](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/scores-fixtures)]([FIFA](https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/scores-fixtures)) · [[ESPN](https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/48939282/2026-fifa-world-cup-fixtures-results-match-schedule-group-stage-knockout-rounds-bracket)]([ESPN](https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/48939282/2026-fifa-world-cup-fixtures-results-match-schedule-group-stage-knockout-rounds-bracket)) · [[Sky Sports](https://www.skysports.com/football/news/11095/13556636/world-cup-2026-bracket-and-knockout-fixtures-whos-facing-who-in-the-last-32-and-route-to-final)]([Sky Sports](https://www.skysports.com/football/news/11095/13556636/world-cup-2026-bracket-and-knockout-fixtures-whos-facing-who-in-the-last-32-and-route-to-final))*
